projects.title: 2048 Bot
projects.description: Plays 2048 automatically by reading tile colors and picking expectimax moves (Python or compiled C strategy).

projects.title: Local AI Coding Agent
projects.description: Local coding-agent CLI that talks to a llama.cpp OpenAI-style server and runs workspace tools with shell safety checks.

projects.title: ai_file
projects.description: Bash wrapper for Ollama that auto-starts the local server and writes prompt output straight to files.

projects.title: clink
projects.description: CLI helper that drops reusable C comparator functions (like qsort/bsearch int or long long comparators) into source files.

projects.title: fetch
projects.description: Codeforces problem fetcher with difficulty filters, seen/history tracking, cache refresh, and optional browser open.

projects.title: Letter Boxed Solver
projects.description: Letter Boxed solver that filters a big dictionary and finds valid 2-word or 3-word chains.

projects.title: Linear Algebra REPL Tool
projects.description: Exact-arithmetic linear algebra library/REPL with Fraction, Vector, Matrix, and System support plus row-reduction workflows.

projects.title: mac_texter
projects.description: macOS automation script that simulates typing to compose and send Messages app texts.

projects.title: matrices.py
projects.description: Handwritten matrix solver for REF/RREF plus solution interpretation for linear systems.

projects.title: pomodoro
projects.description: Terminal Pomodoro timer that runs work/break rounds and plays alert audio between transitions.

projects.title: problem_emailer
projects.description: Script suite that pulls LeetCode/Codeforces/CSES problems and emails daily or weekly challenges with cache/state tracking.

projects.title: python-neofetch-dupe
projects.description: macfetch: neofetch-style macOS system info CLI with configurable fields, color handling, and custom ASCII logos.

projects.title: transpiler
projects.description: Toy transpiler that parses a small custom language and emits C code (`__out.c`).

projects.title: video-decomp
projects.description: Video decomposition tool that applies truncated SVD to grayscale frames, stores reduced factors, and reconstructs the output video.

projects.title: ttlx
projects.description: CLI utility that sends file content plus prompt instructions to Groq and writes generated LaTeX (`.tex`) files.
